query: What Ollama-based embedding layer did Omnia build for local semantic search?
expected_fact: internal/embed: Ollama HTTP client with search_document:/search_query: prefixes, unit-normalized vectors, own SQLite embeddings.db, brute-force cosine search

query: ¿Dónde se publicó Omnia v0.1.0 y qué se verificó?
expected_fact: github.com/Velion-SpA/omnia + github.com/Velion-SpA/homebrew-tap; verificado end-to-end en ambas máquinas con brew tap

query: How is the Omnia cloud service deployed on the homelab?
expected_fact: systemd unit deploy/omnia-cloud.service running `omnia cloud serve` as a non-root omnia user, EnvironmentFile=/etc/omnia/cloud.env

query: ¿Con qué comando se relanzó el dashboard de Omnia en producción?
Why did Omnia adopt soft-delete plus its own audit log instead of an approval gate for memory updates?
expected_fact: chosen for a 'trust but verify' model so memory updates aren't blocked by an approval bottleneck, while still keeping an audit trail

query: ¿Por qué knownProjects() se refactorizó para devolver la unión de proyectos?
expected_fact: para que el dashboard mostrara TODOS los proyectos del usuario: unión de 'omnia' + config.Projects + todos los targets de config.Routes

query: What architectural pattern unifies the local and cloud Omnia dashboards?
expected_fact: a single shared internal/ui design system (one CSS, one shell) used by both dashboards so there is no visual drift between them

query: ¿Qué cimientos habilitan el índice propio de Omnia sin tocar el motor de Engram?
expected_fact: routing por proyecto + schema omnia-meta v1, como contrato del índice futuro, sin modificar el motor de Engram

query: What does the Omnia dashboard look like today?
expected_fact: redesigned to the 'Command Center' system (variant B), showing memory data instead of raw activity

query: What blocked the Omnia cloud allowlist rollout after the multi-project dashboard work finished?
expected_fact: the homelab being down blocked the cloud allowlist rollout, even though the dashboard multi-project + routing promotion had finished (11 packages green with -race)

query: ¿Qué es el DESIGN.md del sistema de marca de los videos de Omnia?
expected_fact: documento único de brand system para la serie de videos de Omnia, empezando por el video de RBAC (Teams+Roles+Permissions), 16:9 para LinkedIn, 45 segundos
